name: 信息图 / 详情页
description: 带图标、标签、文字说明的信息图，适合详情页 A+ 模块

defaults.background: clean solid background, brand color or white
defaults.composition: structured layout: headline + icon grid + product image, clear hierarchy

prohibitions: 不要使用真实商标/logo。信息图中的文字用假名占位。顶部中央 200×100 区域留空。

prompt_template.subject: infographic layout explaining {product_description}, features and benefits

overrides.composition: product center, 4 feature icons around it, minimal text labels, grid layout
comparison table layout: old vs new, checkmarks and cross marks, clear columns
technical specifications layout, labeled diagram, measurements, structured grid
